atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports new, bilateral elbow pain onset approximately one year and a half ago

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as exacerbated by hand or arm use

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain relieved by rest

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports taking Ibuprofen 800mg three times daily

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical exam reveals limited range of motion on extension of the right elbow

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Palpation of the medial elbow reveals tenderness

atomic_propositions.speaker: test_result
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: X-rays demonstrate no fractures or bony misalignment

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left elbow demonstrates limited range of motion on extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left elbow demonstrates some pain with flexion and extension

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left elbow demonstrates some pain with torsion and twisting supination

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left elbow demonstrates no pain with supination

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's left elbow demonstrates no pain with pronation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's symptoms are consistent with medial epicondylitis.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I am ordering an MRI of both elbows.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will discuss the option of whole blood transfusion with the patient.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will follow up in two weeks to assess the results and discuss a treatment plan.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: I will counsel the patient on activity modification and conservative management strategies.
